author: y4rr
content: Landed in 35729ae7f (release 0.5.7). Dtype-aware dispatcher in load_safetensors: BF16/F16 -> rayon par_iter (CPU-bound half->f32 upcast wins on parallelism), F32/F64 -> serial loop (memory-bandwidth-bound memcpy, parallel regresses). Synthetic benchmark on 16-core RTX 3090: 300 MB BF16 file 0.205 s parallel vs 0.237 s serial = 1.15x speedup; SD-1.5 UNet (F32, 3.4 GB) preserved at 315 s serial (vs the 0.5.6 cycle's 379 s premature par_iter regression). Two new tests verify (a) parallel branch correctness on a multi-tensor BF16 file and (b) FERROTORCH_FORCE_SERIAL_LOAD=1 escape hatch produces bit-identical output. 162 lib tests pass (was 160). New examples/bench_load_dispatcher.rs runnable example for future tuning measurements.
